summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo Dojo Virtuel with 10 mini-games. All requested features verified: Login flow, navigation to dojo-virtuel page, Virtual Dojo dialog with 10 game cards, Maître Tanaka avatar and welcome message, Ki counter and progress display, game card click functionality, game detail view with description/skills/rewards, and start game button launching game interface.
critical_code_review_comments: VirtualDojo component correctly implements 10 mini-games with proper unlock levels
All game cards have proper data-testid attributes (game-card-{game_id})
Game detail view shows all required info: description, age range, duration, XP/Ki rewards, skills
Each game component has its own data-testid (e.g., miroir-harmonie-game, memory-sensei-game)
Ki counter and progress (0/10) display correctly in header
Locked games show lock icon and required level (Réflexe Pacifique needs level 3, Quête des 7 Vertus needs level 4)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dojo Virtuel with 10 mini-games fully tested. All games accessible via /fr/aikido/dojo-virtuel page. Dialog opens automatically when page loads. Games have level-based unlocking. User level 0 can access: Le Messager du Ki, Miroir d'Harmonie. Level 1: Parcours du Souffle, Chemin de l'Équilibre, Memory du Sensei. Level 2: Le Sensei Invisible, Gardien de l'Espace, Rythme du Dojo. Level 3: Réflexe Pacifique. Level 4: Quête des 7 Vertus.
